where_to_eat.name: Local Tapas Bars
where_to_eat.description: Barcelona's vibrant bar scene offers authentic tapas dining experiences. Perfect for solo travelers or groups looking to share tables and enjoy traditional Spanish cuisine with wine.

where_to_eat.name: Barceloneta Beach Area Restaurants
where_to_eat.description: The beachfront Barceloneta neighborhood offers dining options with views of the Mediterranean. Known for fresh seafood and local dining atmosphere.

into_the_wild.name: Jardí Botànic Marimurtra
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful botanical garden located right by the sea in Blanes, just a couple hours drive from Barcelona. Features Mediterranean flora with stunning coastal views and worth combining with nearby Tossa de Mar.

into_the_wild.name: Tossa de Mar
into_the_wild.description: A scenic coastal destination just a short drive from Jardí Botànic Marimurtra. Beautiful beaches and charming seaside town perfect for a day trip from Barcelona.

into_the_wild.name: Mountain trails near Rupit
into_the_wild.description: Beautiful hiking and outdoor opportunities in the Catalan mountains, about an hour and a half from Barcelona city center. Great for experiencing nature and mountain scenery.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Sagrada Família
gram_worthy_spots.description: Gaudí's iconic basilica and one of Barcelona's most photographed landmarks. Recently completed with its tallest tower finished, offering stunning architecture for photos.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Aerial viewpoints of Barcelona neighborhoods
gram_worthy_spots.description: Various rooftop and elevated locations throughout Barcelona offer incredible bird's-eye views of the city's unique architecture and neighborhoods, perfect for capturing the city's layout and character.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Gaudí's architectural landmarks
gram_worthy_spots.description: Barcelona's famous modernist buildings by Antoni Gaudí provide stunning photogenic locations throughout the city. These architectural masterpieces are visually spectacular.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Rupit - Medieval Mountain Town
off_the_beaten_path.description: A charming and beautiful small medieval town in the Catalan mountains about an hour and a half from Barcelona. Features narrow streets, character, and a historic bell tower (€2 to climb) offering panoramic views.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Residential neighborhoods with local character
off_the_beaten_path.description: Hidden pockets of Barcelona's residential areas offer authentic local life and unique photography opportunities away from the main tourist circuits. These areas showcase the real character of Barcelona neighborhoods.
